title: callicarpa tomentosa var. longipetiolata
intro: Callicarpa tomentosa var. longipetiolata, also known as the purple fruit callicarpa, is a variety of flowering plant in the Lamiaceae family, characterized by its vibrant purple flowers and red-purple berries. The plant is said to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Callicarpa tomentosa var. longipetiolata include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, are used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
